---
title: "Teaching"
---

I have taught the following seminar courses at the University of Vienna, at the BA level:\
(*All courses taught in English. Student evaluation: 1 = best, 5 = worse*)

Further information can be found in the University's [course directory](https://ufind.univie.ac.at/en/person.html?id=1004088).

### As instructor

**Winter 2025**<br>
Parties and Institutions\
- Student evaluation: [1.5 (13 respondents)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YHxclBs3YxJBW1nyyKA5QXly9xpymdlO/view?usp=sharing)\

**Winter 2024**<br>
Parties and Institutions\
- Student evaluation (group 1): [1.5 (17 respondents)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Dh3zOujc8x9FmMt7iEAocuVvHYxG6Z5j/view?usp=sharing)\
- Student evaluation (group 2): [1.6 (20 respondents)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zYXLJLJHjJmQ6q3XMNBTqQt55j038Y-d/view?usp=sharing)\

**Winter 2023**<br>
Comparative Political Analysis\
- Student evaluation: [2.0 (22 respondents)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pM63TPTLcGqTOULNTddD_3SlNjGhn1Wy/view?usp=sharing)\


### As co-instructor

**Summer 2025**<br>
Introduction to Climate Policy\
- Student evaluation: [1.6 (11 respondents)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jw-ZkESkXfXj36t2NpCnCtcpsUYz5OIP/view?usp=sharing)\
